product_overview: DataSage is an autonomous AI-powered data analytics platform where authenticated users upload CSV files and receive cleaning, EDA, insights, charts, forecasting, and downloadable reports. It also provides session history management, dataset Q&A, and secure authentication through email/password and Google OAuth.
core_goals: Enable authenticated CSV upload and automated analysis session creation
Provide rich dataset outputs including cleaning results, insights, charts, anomaly detection, clustering, and forecasting
Support secure session lifecycle management with status tracking, history browsing, and downloadable artifacts
Offer user-level access control so each analysis is available only to its owner
Expose a reliable backend API with health checks and predictable error handling

features.name: Health Check API
features.description: Allows clients and monitoring systems to verify that the backend service is running and healthy.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/health during backend outage -> Receive non-200 error response indicating service is unavailable

features.name: Session Upload and Analysis Start
features.description: Lets an authenticated user upload a CSV file to create a new analysis session and begin the autonomous pipeline.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/session/upload with valid CSV multipart file and JWT -> Receive 200 with session_id, pending status, and dataset_info -> Analysis session starts
POST /api/v1/session/upload with invalid or empty CSV file -> Receive 400 validation error
POST /api/v1/session/upload with a file that exceeds server validation or is not CSV -> Receive error response and no session is created

features.name: Session Progress and Analysis Retrieval
features.description: Allows an authenticated user to monitor pipeline progress and retrieve completed analysis results for a specific session.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/session/{session_id}/status with valid JWT -> Receive 200 with current pipeline step and progress details -> GET /api/v1/session/{session_id}/analysis after completion -> Receive 200 with final insights and generated charts
GET /api/v1/session/{session_id}/status for unknown session_id -> Receive 404 Not Found
GET /api/v1/session/{session_id}/analysis before completion -> Receive response indicating analysis is not yet ready or an equivalent non-200 error

features.name: History Listing
features.description: Provides a paginated list of the authenticated user's previous analysis sessions for browsing and reopening past work.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/history with valid JWT -> Receive 200 with paginated history entries for the user
GET /api/v1/history when the user has no sessions -> Receive 200 with an empty history response
GET /api/v1/history with invalid/expired JWT -> Receive unauthorized or redirected authentication failure

features.name: Health Check API
features.description: Health endpoint to verify API status

features.name: Session Management API
features.description: Handle CSV uploads and analysis session state

endpoints.description: Upload a CSV file and start an autonomous analysis session
Check the progress status of a running analysis
Retrieve the final insights and generated charts for a completed session

features.name: History API
features.description: Retrieve a history of user's past data analysis sessions

endpoints.description: Get paginated list of past analysis sessions for the authenticated user
